allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory" -Directory | Where-Object Name -NotMatch "^node_modules" | ForEach-Object { Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Directory -Depth 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ Path = $_.FullName; Name = $_.Name } } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\scripts" -Recurse | Select-Object -Property FullName, @{Name='Type';Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'DIR'}else{'FILE'}}} | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\scripts" -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $false } | Select-Object -Property FullName | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("E:\\Dev XRoad\\roadstory\\scripts\\", "scripts/"\) } | Format-List)
